pageContext.name: Titanosaurus
pageContext.description: From the movie Terror of Mechagodzilla released in 1975 comes the Terrifying Dragon Titanosaurus, now in DefoReal form! The vibrant red, black, and yellow body colors, the powerful wind-generating tail fin, and the slender, twisting antenna have all been faithfully reproduced in a deformed yet detailed design! The dorsal and tail fins are molded with transparent elements for an authentic appearance straight from the movies. The figure stands firmly at the ready, sculpted with a strong sense of presence as if it were prepared for its head-to-head confrontation with the mighty Godzilla.  We hope you will enjoy Titanosaurus, the pitiful yet fearsome dragon controlled by Dr. Mafune for revenge against human society!
